UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WALTER GIBEAU'S MOTION OF DEFENDANT FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS RE THE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. CCP 366.3 APPLIES TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM/ACTION WHICH ARISES OUT OF DECEDENT'S ORAL PROMISE TO MAKE A TESTAMENTARY DISTRIBUTION FROM HIS ESTATE. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO BRING THEIR CLAIM WITHIN ONE YEAR OF DEATH. JUDGE: HARRY M. DORFMAN, CLERK: MARS GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft For Judgment On The Pleadings Re The Pltf'S Complaint;
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances by both Parties, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT WALTER GIBEAU's Motion Of Defendant For Judgment On The Pleadings Re The Plaintiff's Complaint is GRANTED. CCP 366.3 applies to Plaintiff's claim/action which arises out of decedent's oral promise to make a testamentary distribution from his estate. Plaintiffs failed to bring their claim within one year of death. Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
